query:
=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[tool: Agent(Architect pattern/procedure extraction) → ]
[Assistant] Both entries are high quality. #3452 has wrong tag (`bugfix-342` — should be `bugfix-66`). Building the retrospective briefing for the architect.

**Retrospective Briefing — bugfix-66:**
- 1 session, 516 records, 35min, zero gate failures, zero rework
- **Hotspots (3 warnings):** context_load 112 KB before first write (tester), compile_cycles 33 in testing phase, permission_retries 9 total
- **Outlier:** edit_bloat_ratio 0.6 vs mean 0.2 (1.7σ) — expected (152-line fix + tests)
- **Recommendations:** add build/test commands to settings.json allowlist; batch compiles
- **Stewardship:** #3448 (lesson) good structure ✓; #3452 (pattern) good but tagged `bugfix-342` (should be `bugfix-66`)
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: Implementation agents must write gate report artifacts, not just self-assess
Intentional Pseudocode Deviations Must Surface as Explicit DEVIATION Block in Agent Report, Not as Design Notes
Missing agent-0/agent-1 reports are the most common bugfix gate failure pattern
Agent reports omit Knowledge Stewardship section unless structurally enforced — recurring pattern (col-022, col-028, nan-009, crt-030)
Batch bugfix sessions must establish a clean worktree from main before spawning work agents
